_comment: REV-06 detected-pattern fixture. 22 SCORED cycles in trailing-28 → nWorst = floor(22/4) = 5. The 5 lowest recovery days (engineered to be the bottom quartile) carry sleep_duration ~ 240 min on the prior night, while the other 17 days carry the default 450 min. Such a large median separation (240 vs 450) yields Mann-Whitney p_raw very close to 0 for sleep_duration_prior_night; the other 4 candidates have no engineered signal so their p_raw values sit near 0.5. BH at q=0.10 / m=5 rejects only the smallest p (the sleep one) → pattern.kind='detected', factor='sleep_duration_prior_night', pattern_confidence='strong' (N=22 ≥ 20).
name: weekly-pattern-clears-fdr
